allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['structured_response']; print\('THREATS'\); [print\(' ',t['object_id'],t['state'],'-',t['reason']\) for t in d['threats']]; print\(\); print\('RECS'\); [print\(f' #{r[\\"rank\\"]} {r[\\"action\\"]}\\n    quad=\({r[\\"structured_reasoning\\"][\\"threat\\"]},{r[\\"structured_reasoning\\"][\\"state\\"]},{r[\\"structured_reasoning\\"][\\"effect\\"]},{r[\\"structured_reasoning\\"][\\"affected_object\\"]}\)\\n    reason={r[\\"reason\\"]}'\) for r in d['recommendations']]; print\(\); print\('GRAPH coverage=',d['causal_graph']['threat_reasoning_coverage']\); print\('orphans=',d['causal_graph']['orphan_threats']\)")
